zh.lifeSummary: 當Miles Oakley於大約1574年出生在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登時，他的父親Miles Oakley21歲，母親Agnes Bell20歲。他於大約1594年與Susan May在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1635年7月在英國艾可可爾斯特享年62歲，埋葬在英國艾可可爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Miles Oakley于大约1574年出生在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登时，他的父亲Miles Oakley21岁，母亲Agnes Bell20岁。他于大约1594年与Susan May在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1635年7月在英国艾可可爾斯特享年62岁，埋葬在英国艾可可爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Oakley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain derivation. Unlike most Norman names it is, as far as can be ascertained, not derived from any known Old French or Germanic name element. It may be a greatly altered pet form of Michael , which came to be associated with the Latin word miles ‘soldier’ because of the military attributes of the archangel Michael. However, the usual Latin form of the name in the Middle Ages was Milo. There is a common Slavic name element mil ‘grace, favour’, with which it may possibly have some connection. The name has been in regular use in England since the 16th century. See also Milo and Myles .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Miles Oakley was born about 1574, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, his father, Miles Oakley, was 21 and his mother, Agnes Bell, was 20. He married Susan May about 1594, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in July 1635, in Colchester, Essex, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Colchester, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Miles Oakley est né environ 1574, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Miles Oakley, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes Bell, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Susan May environ 1594, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en juillet 1635, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Miles Oakley um 1574 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Miles Oakley 21 und seine Mutter Agnes Bell 20. Er hat um 1594 in England, United Kingdom Susan May geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Juli 1635 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Colchester, Essex, England und wurde in Colchester, Essex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Miles Oakleyが約1574年にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで生まれた時，父Miles Oakleyは21歳，母Agnes Bellは20歳であった。約1594年にイギリスイギリスでSusan Mayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年7月にイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで62歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスコルチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Miles Oakley(이)가 대략 1574년 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Miles Oakley(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Bell(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1594년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Susan May(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년 7월 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 코체스터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Miles Oakley родился около 1574 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Miles Oakley было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Bell, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Susan May около 1594 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер июль 1635 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия.
